grid-item.name: colSpan
grid-item.description: Number of columns to span, or `"auto"`.

grid-item.name: rowSpan
grid-item.description: Number of rows to span, or `"auto"`.

text.name: as
text.description: Underlying DOM element. Defaults to a sensible element per variant (heading variants render `h1`–`h6`, everything else `p`). Override to keep a correct document outline. DOM props for the element are typed and forwarded.

text.name: children
text.description:
The text to render. Prefer plain strings and numbers; inline elements are allowed where you genuinely need them (a `
`, an inline link), but reach for Box to compose layout rather than nesting containers inside Text.

text.name: formatter
text.description: Format the children value for display. 'number' adds grouping separators (3290033 → "3,290,033"), 'compact' shortens (3290033 → "3.3M"), or pass a function for full control. Pass the raw value as children, not a pre-formatted string.

text.name: lineThrough
text.description: Apply a line-through decoration, e.g. for a struck-out previous price.

text.name: loading
text.description: Render a pulsing skeleton placeholder instead of children, for content that is still loading.

text.name: monospace
text.description: Render in the monospace font family while keeping the variant's size and weight. Orthogonal to `variant`, so any text can be monospaced.

text.name: placeholderNumberOfLines
text.description: When greater than 1, renders a multi-line loading skeleton with that many lines.

text.name: placeholderText
text.description: Sizes the single-line loading skeleton. Falls back to children, then to "Loading...".

text.name: tabularNums
text.description: Align figures for vertical scanning in tables and stat readouts. Pairs well with a numeric `formatter`.

text.name: truncate
text.description: Truncate overflow. `true` clamps to a single line with an ellipsis; a number clamps to that many lines. The component owns the CSS, so callers never hand-roll line-clamp utilities.

button-group.name: actions
button-group.description: One or two actions. The first renders as the primary (default) button, the second as a quieter ghost button.

button-group.name: size
button-group.description: Button size applied to every action in the group.

alert.name: title
alert.description: The headline of the alert, rendered in the variant's accent color.

alert.name: actions
alert.description: One or two call-to-action buttons, rendered bottom-right via ButtonGroup. The first is the primary action, the second a quieter ghost button.

alert.name: description
alert.description: Supporting copy shown beneath the title. Accepts inline elements (links, bold text, …), not just a plain string. Omit for a title-only alert.

alert.name: loading
alert.description: Swaps the variant icon for a spinner, for an alert whose subject is still resolving. Colors and layout are unchanged.

alert.name: onDismiss
alert.description: Called when the dismiss button is pressed. Provide it to render a dismiss button; omit it for a persistent alert.

alert.name: variant
alert.description: Picks the icon, surface tint and accent color in one go. Use it to map the alert to its meaning rather than styling icon and colors by hand.

status.name: color
status.description: Applies a predefined color treatment. Omit for a neutral, color-less chip.

datatable.name: getRowId
datatable.type: ((originalRow: TData, index: number, parent?: Row<TData> | undefined) => string)
